service.name: Klaviyo API
service.description_for_ai: Email and SMS marketing platform for e-commerce. 150K+ brands use it. Segments, flows (automation), campaigns, profiles, events, metrics. Deep Shopify integration. Use for e-commerce email marketing automation.

auth.cost: Free: up to 500 contacts. Paid from $20/month

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get email performance metrics: opens, clicks, revenue per email, unsubscribes for campaigns.
Create or update a customer profile in Klaviyo with email, custom properties for segmentation.

data.description: {type: profile, attributes: {email, first_name, last_name, phone_number, properties: {}}}

capabilities.description_for_ai: Track a customer event in Klaviyo to trigger automations. E.g. Placed Order, Viewed Product, Added to Cart.

data.description: {type: event, attributes: {profile: {email}, metric: {name: Placed Order}, properties: {value: 99.99}}}
